sub_questions.ms_text: Attach to / clump / kill / destroy pathogens / make memory cells (1)
Complete marking criteria for this question: Only mention specific points or phrases from the text (e.g. 'antigens', 'foreign cells') without repeating them. Ignore arrows pointing upwards.
Value should be between 0.29 mm and 0.33 mm; answer should be accurate to two decimal places.

Complete marking criteria for this question: 

The correct input format is based on the mark scheme and requires an explanation that makes reference to four of the following points:
	•   killed / destroyed (1)
	•   digested / broken down (1)
	•   by enzymes / named enzyme (1)
	•   products absorbed (by phagocyte) (1)

Marking details for sub-question 6: The correct input format is based on the marking criteria provided in the mark scheme. For this question, the answer should be written in a standard open-ended format with no specific label or unit required.

Only A is correct as 85 per hour is the rate of ingestion of bacteria in the control. B is incorrect as the rate is not this per hour. C is incorrect as the rate is not this per hour. D is incorrect as the rate is not this per hour.
